briefs.title: Council to Consider: Fence Rental Contract Renewal Worth $267,000 for 2026–2027
briefs.summary: Burnaby City Council is set to vote on renewing a fence rental contract for one more year (June 2026 to May 2027) at $267,000 — a 6.8% increase over the current term. If approved, the total value of this contract since 2022 would reach an estimated $766,000 including tax.
briefs.action_required: Watch for the council decision if you supply fencing or compete for City rental contracts.

key_dates.label: Burnaby fence rental contract renewal start date — pending approval
